ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "tx_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "tx_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., regular, internal) */,
  "tx_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the transaction */,
  "fees_burned" REAL /* Fees burned during the transaction */,
  "gas_price" REAL /* Gas price of the transaction */,
  "gas_used" REAL /* Gas used by the transaction */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address the transaction was sent from */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address the transaction was sent to */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number the transaction was included in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the transaction belongs to (e.g., System, MyID, bnUSD, governance) */,
  "blockchain_network" TEXT /* Blockchain network the transaction was performed on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tx_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_blockchain_network FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_network") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_address FOREIGN KEY ("to_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., internal event excluding transaction) */,
  "event_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the event */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address the event was sent to */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the event belongs to (e.g., System, MyID, bnUSD, governance) */,
  "blockchain_network" TEXT /* Blockchain network the event was performed on */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* Address of the contract that triggered the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the event */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number the event was included in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_blockchain_network FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_network") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_to_address FOREIGN KEY ("to_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address on the blockchain */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the address belongs to (e.g., System, MyID, bnUSD, governance) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the address */,
  "public_key" TEXT /* Public key associated with the address */,
  "private_key" TEXT /* Private key associated with the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., System, MyID, bnUSD, governance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
